title: 宠物
description_uz: «Uy hayvoning bormi?» — do'sting bilan mushuk, uni boqish va parvarish haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog egalik haqida so'rash, miqdor va chastotani aytish va maslahat berishni mashq qiladi. Yoqimli mavzu va kundalik foydali so'zlar. Takrorlab o'rganib, gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «У тебя есть домашнее животное?» — разговор с другом о кошке, её кормлении и уходе. Этот диалог отрабатывает вопросы о наличии, указание количества и частоты и советы. Приятная тема и полезная повседневная лексика. Отлично подходит для шэдоуинга и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «Do you have any pets?» — a chat with a friend about a cat, feeding it, and looking after it. This dialogue practises asking what someone has, stating amounts and frequency, and giving advice. A pleasant topic with useful everyday words. Great for shadowing and building speaking confidence.

sentences.text_original: 你养宠物吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǎng chǒng wù ma?
sentences.text_translation: Uy hayvoni boqasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя есть домашний питомец?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you keep any pets?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 养。我养了一只猫。
sentences.pinyin: Yǎng. Wǒ yǎng le yì zhī māo.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Men bitta mushuk boqaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. У меня есть кошка.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. I have a cat.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 真的吗？猫可爱吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Māo kě ài ma?
sentences.text_translation: Rostdanmi? Mushuk yoqimtoymi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Правда? Кошка милая?
sentences.text_translation_en: Really? Is the cat cute?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很可爱！它叫小花，是白色的。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn kě ài! Tā jiào Xiǎo Huā, shì bái sè de.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yoqimtoy! Uning ismi Syaohua, oq rangda.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень милая! Её зовут Сяохуа, она белая.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very cute! Her name is Xiao Hua, and she's white.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 它多大了？
sentences.pinyin: Tā duō dà le?
sentences.text_translation: U necha yoshda?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько ей лет?
sentences.text_translation_en: How old is she?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一岁了。它很小，但是很聪明。
sentences.pinyin: Yí suì le. Tā hěn xiǎo, dàn shì hěn cōng ming.
sentences.text_translation: Bir yoshda. U kichkina, lekin juda aqlli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Один год. Она маленькая, но очень умная.
sentences.text_translation_en: One year old. She's small, but very smart.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 它喜欢吃什么？
sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐ huan chī shén me?
sentences.text_translation: U nima yeyishni yoqtiradi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что она любит есть?
sentences.text_translation_en: What does she like to eat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 它喜欢吃鱼和猫粮。
sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐ huan chī yú hé māo liáng.
sentences.text_translation: U baliq va mushuk yemini yoqtiradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Она любит рыбу и кошачий корм.
sentences.text_translation_en: She likes fish and cat food.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你每天喂它几次？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān wèi tā jǐ cì?
sentences.text_translation: Uni har kuni necha marta boqasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько раз в день ты её кормишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many times a day do you feed her?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 喂三次。早上、中午和晚上。
sentences.pinyin: Wèi sān cì. Zǎo shang, zhōng wǔ hé wǎn shang.
sentences.text_translation: Uch marta. Ertalab, tushda va kechqurun.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Три раза. Утром, в обед и вечером.
sentences.text_translation_en: Three times. Morning, noon, and evening.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 它睡觉睡得多吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shuì jiào shuì de duō ma?
sentences.text_translation: U ko'p uxlaydimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Она много спит?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does she sleep a lot?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很多。它一天睡十几个小时。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn duō. Tā yì tiān shuì shí jǐ ge xiǎo shí.
sentences.text_translation: Juda ko'p. U kuniga o'n bir-o'n besh soat uxlaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Много. Она спит больше десяти часов в день.
sentences.text_translation_en: A lot. She sleeps more than ten hours a day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 哇，真幸福！我也想养一只猫。
sentences.pinyin: Wā, zhēn xìng fú! Wǒ yě xiǎng yǎng yì zhī māo.
sentences.text_translation: Voy, juda baxtli! Men ham bitta mushuk boqmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот это счастье! Я тоже хочу завести кошку.
sentences.text_translation_en: Wow, so lucky! I'd like to get a cat too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你可以养猫。猫很干净，不需要每天出去散步。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kě yǐ yǎng māo. Māo hěn gān jìng, bù xū yào měi tiān chū qù sàn bù.
sentences.text_translation: Mushuk boqsang bo'ladi. Mushuk toza, har kuni sayrga olib chiqish shart emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты можешь завести кошку. Кошки чистые, их не нужно каждый день выгуливать.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can keep a cat. Cats are clean and don't need to go out for walks every day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 养狗和养猫哪个更好？
sentences.pinyin: Yǎng gǒu hé yǎng māo nǎ ge gèng hǎo?
sentences.text_translation: It boqish va mushuk boqish — qaysi biri yaxshiroq?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что лучше — держать собаку или кошку?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which is better, keeping a dog or a cat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 看你的时间。狗需要人陪，猫比较独立。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn nǐ de shí jiān. Gǒu xū yào rén péi, māo bǐ jiào dú lì.
sentences.text_translation: Vaqtingga bog'liq. It odamning hamrohligini xohlaydi, mushuk esa mustaqilroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Зависит от твоего времени. Собаке нужна компания, кошки более независимы.
sentences.text_translation_en: It depends on your time. Dogs need company, cats are more independent.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我工作很忙，可能养猫更好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gōng zuò hěn máng, kě néng yǎng māo gèng hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ishim juda band, ehtimol mushuk boqgan yaxshiroqdir.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я очень занят на работе, наверное, кошка лучше.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm very busy with work, so a cat is probably better.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。养猫不难，但是你要记得喂它。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Yǎng māo bù nán, dàn shì nǐ yào jì de wèi tā.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Mushuk boqish qiyin emas, lekin uni boqishni eslab turishing kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Держать кошку не сложно, но нужно не забывать её кормить.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. Keeping a cat isn't hard, but you have to remember to feed her.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 谢谢你的建议！我考虑一下。
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie nǐ de jiàn yì! Wǒ kǎo lǜ yí xià.
sentences.text_translation: Maslahating uchun rahmat! O'ylab ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо за совет! Я подумаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks for the advice! I'll think about it.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不客气。如果你想养，我可以送你一只小猫。
sentences.pinyin: Bú kè qi. Rú guǒ nǐ xiǎng yǎng, wǒ kě yǐ sòng nǐ yì zhī xiǎo māo.
sentences.text_translation: Arzimaydi. Agar boqmoqchi bo'lsang, senga bitta mushukcha sovg'a qila olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не за что. Если захочешь завести, я могу подарить тебе котёнка.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome. If you want one, I can give you a kitten.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 太好了！我想好了告诉你。
sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒ xiǎng hǎo le gào su nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi! Qaror qilsam, senga aytaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! Когда решу, скажу тебе.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! I'll tell you once I've decided.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的，等你消息。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, děng nǐ xiāo xi.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, xabaringni kutaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, жду твоего сообщения.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll wait to hear from you.
sentences.speaker: B
